visual_description: Three silhouetted figures walk away through a towering gothic archway amid rubble. The scene cuts to a close-up of a young man with round glasses looking forward. The view shifts to a dimly lit library filled with towering shelves and then to a dark corridor where a lone figure walks toward a distant light.
